# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: app-service-account
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
  properties:
    accountId: app-external-service
    displayName: Application External Service Account
    description: Service account for external application authentication

- name: app-service-account-key
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccounts.key
  properties:
    parent: $(ref.app-service-account.name)
    privateKeyType: TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE
    keyAlgorithm: KEY_ALG_RSA_2048
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - app-service-account

- name: storage-bucket-for-keys
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: ${PROJECT_ID}-service-account-keys
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
      publicAccessPrevention: enforced
    versioning:
      enabled: true
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: projects/${PROJECT_ID}/locations/us/keyRings/app-keyring/cryptoKeys/service-account-key-encryption
    lifecycleRule:
    - action:
        type: Delete
      condition:
        age: 90
        numNewerVersions: 3

- name: project-viewer-binding
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: ${PROJECT_ID}
    role: roles/viewer
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - app-service-account

- name: storage-object-viewer-binding
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: ${PROJECT_ID}
    role: roles/storage.objectViewer
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - app-service-account

- name: workload-identity-user-binding
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: ${PROJECT_ID}
    role: roles/iam.workloadIdentityUser
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - app-service-account

outputs:
- name: serviceAccountEmail
  value: $(ref.app-service-account.email)
- name: serviceAccountName
  value: $(ref.app-service-account.name)
- name: privateKeyData
  value: $(ref.app-service-account-key.privateKeyData)
- name: keyName
  value: $(ref.app-service-account-key.name)
- name: keyValidAfterTime
  value: $(ref.app-service-account-key.validAfterTime)
- name: keyValidBeforeTime
  value: $(ref.app-service-account-key.validBeforeTime)
- name: storageBucket
  value: $(ref.storage-bucket-for-keys.name)
